rulings.Case Title: VERONICA TEDESCHI VS. PHILLIP GARDELLE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For Reconsideration Of The August 15, 2011 Court Orders
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Although the Court is concerned that Plaintiff¿s counsel was less than forthright in response to the Court¿s questions on August 15, 2011, the third-party evidence currently before the Court does suggest that sufficient, timely efforts were made to alert opposing counsel to an intent to oppose. The Court is not inclined to hold an evidentiary hearing on this collateral issue, especially given the likelihood that Plaintiff would end up with leave to amend in any event so that Plaintiff would not be prejudiced due to her counsel¿s neglect and since Defendants suffer no cognizable prejudice beyond having to meet the merits of the amended complaint. If any counsel or party wishes to contest the tentative rulings, they must contact opposing counsel and the Court (415-551-5879) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, October 26, 2011.

rulings.Case Title: ARTURO ARAQUE VS. EMMANUEL N DEMOUSSY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For Reconsideration Of Court'S Earlier Ruling Granting Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Defendant has provided neither a procedural nor a substantive basis for reconsideration or alteration of the Court¿s ruling. If any counsel or party wishes to contest the tentative rulings, they must contact opposing counsel and the Court (415-551-5879) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, October 26, 2011.
